notes: NOT compatible with iControl (no RJ12 port); smart on/off control only via iHub-Pro or iTime smart outlet (sold separately). Wheeled base and top-fill design. 4 adjustable mist levels (510–1600 ml/h; min derived from 15 L / 29 h runtime). Includes wired sensor probe, 1 long pipe, 4 short pipes, 2 long + 4 short flexible hoses, 4 nozzles, 3 Velcro strips, remote control. Recommended for tents 5×5 ft (≈150 cm) and larger; coverage up to 80 m² / 861 ft². Noise <40 dB confirmed by LED Grow Lights Depot product page.
